---
name: Feature request
about: Something the mod should do, or do better
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What you would like the mod to do

A short description of the feature or improvement.

## Why it matters for accessibility

If the request is about a part of the game that is currently unplayable or
hard to play with a screen reader, describe what the experience is like
today and what would make it work.

## Where in the game it applies

Which screen, area, or mechanic. If the feature is global (a hotkey, an
announcement style, an audio cue), say so.

## Anything else

Related issues, similar features in other accessibility mods, or links
to the part of the game you are describing.
